docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUHN, DUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAITNFF DUSTIN MUHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC IS PRESENT.
